agents.name: Coordinator
agents.description: Routes incoming goals, delegates to specialists, and tracks progress across the team.

agents.name: Engineer
agents.description: Writes, refactors, and reviews code. Runs tests and proposes fixes.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Gathers sources, summarizes findings, and verifies claims against evidence.

agents.name: Writer
agents.description: Drafts and edits prose, documentation, and release notes in the project voice.

agents.name: Operator
agents.description: Handles deployments, schedules, and routine system maintenance tasks.
